title: ThatOneRPG
description: This is a fantasy RPG modpack with many mods that make the game more challenging and entertaining.
body:
This is my new fantasy RPG modpack based on Forge and Fabric mods. 
The modpack is generally intended to increase the game experience and difficulty. 
There are:
- Origins 
- Classes
- New Biomes
- New Bosses
- Overhauled worldgeneration
- Performance increasing
- New dimensions
- added 150+ weapons
  
and many other things to achieve the best gaming experience.
